title: Adobe CJM ExperienceEvent - Custom Execution Metrics
description: Per-recipient HTTP delivery results — status, latency, and error — for outbound deliveries through customer-configured channels in Adobe Journey Optimizer. These vary by recipient and delivery attempt. Execution-level configuration that is constant across recipients (endpoint, method, throttling, channel name) is carried on the AJO entity, not here.

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.title: Response Time
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.description: Time in milliseconds for the request/response exchange with the endpoint. Equals the configured timeout for a timed-out request. Absent when no request was attempted.

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.title: Status Code
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.description: The HTTP response status code returned by the endpoint. Absent when no response was received.

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.title: Error Code
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.description: A code describing the failure, carrying the raw HTTP status for endpoint errors (for example, `HTTP_404`). Open string; see examples for sample values. Absent on success.

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.title: Error Reason
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.description: A human-readable description of the failure, for drilldown. Absent on success.
